interaction_phrase: Finland's success in EU programmes
occurrence_sentence: The high level of academic research is reflected in Finland's success in EU programmes and strong participation in European quantum coordination.

interaction_phrase: the Research Council of Finland's Centre of Excellence and infrastructure funding
occurrence_sentence: The government has invested in the research of quantum science and technology and the long-term development of research infrastructure since the mid-1990s, especially with the Research Council of Finland's Centre of Excellence and infrastructure funding.

interaction_phrase: strong participation in European quantum coordination
occurrence_sentence: The high level of academic research is reflected in Finland's success in EU programmes and strong participation in European quantum coordination.

interaction_phrase: These quantum computers of VTT and Aalto University operate as part of
occurrence_sentence: These quantum computers of VTT and Aalto University operate as part of Finland's Quantum Computing (FiQCI) infrastructure.

interaction_phrase: OtaNano, which includes Micronova cleanrooms, a cold laboratory and a nanomicroscopy centre
occurrence_sentence: Finland also has several other high-level shared infrastructures that provide an excellent framework for research and development activities in the sector, strengthening Finland's position as a promoter of innovations, for example: OtaNano, which includes Micronova cleanrooms, a cold laboratory and a nanomicroscopy centre, as well as the research infrastructures of the University of Jyväskylä's Nanoscience Centre and the FinnLight infrastructure focusing on photonics.

interaction_phrase: the research infrastructures of the University of Jyväskylä's Nanoscience Centre
occurrence_sentence: Finland also has several other high-level shared infrastructures that provide an excellent framework for research and development activities in the sector, strengthening Finland's position as a promoter of innovations, for example: OtaNano, which includes Micronova cleanrooms, a cold laboratory and a nanomicroscopy centre, as well as the research infrastructures of the University of Jyväskylä's Nanoscience Centre and the FinnLight infrastructure focusing on photonics.

interaction_phrase: quantum flagship funded by the Research Council of Finland
occurrence_sentence: There have been no long-term funding programmes allocated to the sector before the quantum flagship funded by the Research Council of Finland.

interaction_phrase: cooperation between higher education institutions
occurrence_sentence: Finland's key competitive advantage is a well-functioning national ecosystem in which cooperation between higher education institutions, industry, decision-makers and funders works.

interaction_phrase: pioneer in the EU countries
occurrence_sentence: The introduction of quantum-secure encryption technologies and the protection of critical data as a pioneer in the EU countries will increase Finland's reliability as a partner.

interaction_phrase: has influenced EU and international level decisions
occurrence_sentence: Finland participates in the debate on quantum technology in key international forums and, protecting its national interests, has influenced EU and international level decisions in an effective and determined manner.

interaction_phrase: Other actors: InstituteQ (coordinator)
occurrence_sentence: Responsible parties: higher education institutions Other actors: InstituteQ (coordinator)

interaction_phrase: work together
occurrence_sentence: Business Finland and the Research Council of Finland work together to promote the use of expertise and results obtained from projects and on-going flagships in companies and society, with the aim of strengthening the extensive economic, social and societal impact stemming from research in a sustainable manner.

interaction_phrase: promote exports through their services
occurrence_sentence: Business Finland, the Ministry of Economic Affairs and Employment and the Ministry for Foreign Affairs promote exports through their services, strengthen the recognition of Finnish expertise and Finland as a competent and reliable partner.

interaction_phrase: Cooperation between Business Finland and the Research Council of Finland
occurrence_sentence: Cooperation between Business Finland and the Research Council of Finland in promoting the utilisation of expertise and research results.

interaction_phrase: The Finnish Quantum Flagship funded by the Research Council of Finland and
occurrence_sentence: The Finnish Quantum Flagship funded by the Research Council of Finland and Business Finland's proactive measures targeting quantum technology have launched joint measures.

interaction_phrase: in cooperation with Business Finland's RDI programme
occurrence_sentence: The Ministry for Foreign Affairs promotes the export of Finland's quantum ecosystem and raises awareness of expertise in the field in a goal-oriented and targeted manner in cooperation with Business Finland's RDI programme and other Team Finland actors.

interaction_phrase: together with Business Finland and the InstituteQ
occurrence_sentence: The quantum ecosystem, together with Business Finland and the InstituteQ, creates a framework for increasing quantum awareness for end-user companies.

interaction_phrase: The Team Finland Knowledge network
occurrence_sentence: The Team Finland Knowledge network, Finnish embassies around the world and close cooperation with the business sector can be utilised in exerting influence.

interaction_phrase: Other actors: Business Finland
occurrence_sentence: Responsible parties: InstituteQ Other actors: MEC, Business Finland, Technology Industries of Finland, Team Finland network

interaction_phrase: competitive research funding from the Research Council of Finland
occurrence_sentence: In 2023, the annual volume of research related to the quantum technology sector in universities and research institutes was estimated to be €52 million (the figure does not include investments in infrastructure). Slightly over 20% of this amounted to competitive research funding from the Research Council of Finland, 17% to competitive EU funding, and 8% to RDI funding granted by Business Finland.

interaction_phrase: funded quantum RDI activities by a total of €28 million in 2020–2024
